jsonLd.title: FabAlley is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
FabAlley invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Aurangabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FabAlley:
FabAlley is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FabAlley!
